papers.name: Paper 3 Speaking and Listening
papers.coverage_notes: Speaking and listening assessment at external exam centre.

assessment_objectives.name: Reading and understanding
assessment_objectives.description: Read and understand a range of texts; select and organise relevant information.
classification_hints: Items requiring comprehension, summarising, inference from Chinese texts.

assessment_objectives.name: Writing
assessment_objectives.description: Write accurately, effectively and creatively in Chinese for different purposes and audiences.
classification_hints: Items requiring composition, directed writing, adaptation of language and register.

assessment_objectives.name: Speaking and listening
assessment_objectives.description: Communicate clearly and effectively in spoken Chinese; listen and respond appropriately.
classification_hints: Items involving oral presentation, conversation, listening to and responding to spoken Chinese.

question_styles.name: Directed writing
question_styles.description: Writing based on a given stimulus, audience and purpose.

question_styles.name: Listening
question_styles.description: Listening to spoken Chinese and responding.

difficulty_ladder.description: Recall of facts, definitions or single-step application.

lesson_use.notes: Set supported=true only when a teacher/student/parent mode is declared and validated.

marking_guidance.command_words_ref: CAIE IGCSE Chinese - First Language command words (summarise, evaluate, analyse, write, speak) are defined in Section 4 of the syllabus.
marking_guidance.notes: All papers required for IGCSE award. Speaking and listening (Paper 3) recorded and assessed by examiners.
